title: Japan Subsidies & Grants Data (Official)
description: Fetch government subsidy records of Japanese companies from the official gBizINFO API. Give corporate numbers (fastest), company names, or a ministry for a cross-company search. The first 50 records of every run are free.

corporate_numbers.title: Corporate numbers
corporate_numbers.description: 13-digit Japanese corporate numbers (法人番号), e.g. 7010001008844 for Hitachi, Ltd. Up to 500 companies per run.

company_names.title: Company names (optional)
company_names.description: TEMPORARILY UNAVAILABLE — the National Tax Agency Web-API credential for name resolution is pending; runs using this field fail with a clear error. Use corporate_numbers instead. Once available: Japanese company names, resolved to corporate numbers via the official National Tax Agency registry. Unambiguous matches only — ambiguous names are reported, not guessed.

ministry.title: Ministry (cross-company search)
ministry.description: Search across companies by granting ministry/agency when no corporate numbers are given, e.g. 経済産業省, "Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry", or a gBizINFO ministry code (1-49). Also filters records when combined with corporate numbers.

date_from.title: Approval date from (optional)
date_from.description: Keep only subsidies approved on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

date_to.title: Approval date to (optional)
date_to.description: Keep only subsidies approved on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).
